description: Your company's Human Resources department wants to create a structured Employee Directory on the WordPress site. Using the 'advanced-custom-fields' plugin, create a field group titled 'Employee Info' containing three text fields: 'Job Title' (field name: job_title), 'Department' (field name: department), and 'Office Extension' (field name: office_extension). Configure the field group to display for posts assigned to the 'Team' category. Publish two employee profile posts in the 'Team' category with the following details: 'Emily Chen' (Job Title: Technical Director, Department: Engineering, Office Extension: x402) and 'Marcus Johnson' (Job Title: Creative Lead, Department: Design, Office Extension: x415). Both profiles must be published with their respective custom fields completed.
